summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long ECHO Daily ETF (ECHX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in communication services equity. SATG aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of EchoStar Corporation (Nasdaq: SATS) stock, less fees, and expenses. SATS provides satellite technology, services, and wireless connectivity solutions for consumers, enterprises, and governments.

data.title: QuantRate Launches Free AI Trading Solution for Crypto, Stocks, ETFs, and Forex Investors
